Off Calendar Jan-08-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that the Parties have failed to respond to the Probate Examiner's notes. The Petition for Waiver of Account, etc. is off calendar for failure to address the issues raised in the Examiner's notes.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Robert Shepard for Petitioner.

Mr. Shepard stated he owes the Probate Examiner some notes, is emailing with his client and requested 30 days continuance. The Order to Appear is taken off calendar. The Petition for Waiver of Account; etc. is continued to November 27, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney, Robert Shepard, to appear on October 30, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear to address the examiner's notes. The petition for waiver of account, etc is also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: C. Wu. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate Or In The Alternative A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-15-2018 Continued To Jun-12-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Shepard for Petitioner

Mr. Shepard stated the petition has been drafted, he will have tax information in 2 weeks, and then the client can sign it. The Status on Close of Estate is continued to June 12, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration at least one week prior.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-17-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that this Petition was not verified and no proof of service has been provided to the Court. The Petition to Approve Status of Administration is Denied. A Status date regarding the filing of a new Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration or to bring the estate to a close is set for May 15, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Craig Blackstone. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-20-2018 Continued To Apr-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Shepard for Marilyn Louie (Petitioner)

Mr. Shepard stated that a substitution of attorney is e-filed and pending, and requested a 30 day continuance stating that he believes he can file an accounting and petition for final distribution. The Petition to approve status of administration is continued to April 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-20-2018 Continued To Mar-20-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jonathan Louie for Marilyn Louie (Petitioner).

The Court informed Counsel that it did not receive courtesy copies of the ex parte petition to increase bond, or proof of service, verification and a proposed order of the petition to approve status report. Mr. Louie stated that he hired a messenger service to deliver the copies, apologized and requested a 14-day continuance stating that copies were not mailed. The Petition to Approve Status of Administration is continued to March 20, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-06-2018 Continued To Feb-20-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dave Marcolini, specially appearing for Jonathan Louie as counsel for petitioner Marilyn Louie.

The Court stated that he had not reviewed the ex parte petition to increase bond as no courtesy copy had been delivered to the Court. In addition, the petition to approve status was deficient in that no proof of service or verification were proveded to the court. Mr. Marcolini stated that he was not prepared to address those issues, but merely to advise the court that an amended inventory and appraisal had been prepared, and that it was rejected for efiling so he was prepared to file it today. The Court expressed his concern over the failure of Mr. Louie to cure to the deficiencies of the submissions to which he had received notice in the Probate Examiner notes. The matter was continued to February 20, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Continued To Feb-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dave Marcolini specially appearing for Jonathan Louie on behalf of Marilyn Louie (Petitioner).

The Court stated that there needs to be an inventory. Mr. Marcolini asked for a six week continuance stating that they e-filed a petition to increase bond and a petition for approval of status of administration which are pending. Status on close of estate is continued to February 5, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
